summary: Full pre-goal remains available for high-risk, irreversible, externally impactful, non-replannable, or explicitly full workflows, but is no longer the default Level 3 route.
proof: Updated .agents/skills/orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal/SKILL.md to distinguish lean default from full exception.
Generation-aware official path tests now reject run directories without run.control.json; full mode remains an explicit exception through run.control.json, not the default legacy chain.
